use std::panic;

fn safe_parse(input: &str) -> i64 {
    // BAD: using catch_unwind for expected control flow
    let result = panic::catch_unwind(|| {
        input.parse::<i64>().unwrap()
    });
    match result {
        Ok(val) => val,
        Err(_) => 0,
    }
}

fn process_items(items: &[&str]) -> Vec<i64> {
    items.iter().map(|s| safe_parse(s)).collect()
}
